allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\('\\n'\) for line in lines: try: d = json.loads\(line\) if d.get\('type'\) == 'user' and 'message' in d: msg = d['message'] if msg.get\('role'\) == 'user': content = msg.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, str\) and len\(content\) > 5: print\('USER:', content[:300]\) elif isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\('USER:', c.get\('text',''\)[:300]\) elif d.get\('type'\) == 'assistant' and 'message' in d: msg = d['message'] if msg.get\('role'\) == 'assistant': for c in msg.get\('content', []\): if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\('ASST:', c.get\('text',''\)[:300]\) except: pass ")
